News

How to update: edit _data/latest_news.yml only. Add one new item at the top.

Mar 2026

Invited to serve on the PC for the GenAI4HealthBI Workshop, IEEE/ACM CHASE 2026.

Feb 2026

One paper accepted by IEEE/CVF CVPR 2026. Congratulations, Jingzhou.

Jan 2026

EMPalm accepted by ACM SenSys 2026. Congratulations, Haowen.

Oct 2025

One paper accepted by IEEE TMC.

Oct 2025

Invited to serve on the TPC member of IEEE ICNC 2026.

Mar 2025

Passed dissertation proposal defense.

Feb 2025

One paper accepted by ACM SenSys 2025.

Dec 2024

Two papers accepted by IEEE INFOCOM 2025.

Oct 2024

One paper accepted by IEEE TMC.
